finding_results.notes: Cut the old summary of Dren's wound state and left the arm on the page through visual limitation and present-tense function instead.
Reduced the chapter to a single explicit depleted-landscape image at line 43 and replaced the other environment beats with farmstead, masonry, plaster, and settlement-specific detail.
Removed the repeated thumb-on-spine tic. The journal is now handled through varied contact beats instead of repeating the same grief gesture.
Made the geography explicit: the farmhouse was about two days from the basin by the direct road, and the eastward covert loop spent those same two days buying cover rather than southing.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_16.md:5; chapters/chapter_16.md:27; chapters/chapter_16.md:125; chapters/chapter_16.md:147; chapters/chapter_16.md:185; chapters/chapter_16.md:447; chapters/chapter_16.md:576
finding_results.notes: Brought the Red Reserve warning on-page immediately through relay signaling, active patrol sweeps, Dren timing his departure around coverage, Kem forcing the confession while pinned in hiding, and later perimeter evidence at the well and in the dead settlement.
Expanded the chapter to 7,750 words by adding causally necessary evasion, patrol-pressure, route-planning, and aftermath material rather than filler.

Replaced three theme-mouthpiece lines with concrete trader-register speech. (1) 'You don't know the sound' replaced with 'I've been picking her up off the kitchen floor since spring' — specific, physical, no balanced antithesis. (2) 'My girl's my zero' replaced with 'I've still got a healer in Roth waiting on the second half of a bill / That's the road I should be on' — trader vocabulary (bills, roads) instead of Vel's threshold language. (3) 'once a road starts needing this much not-talking, somebody's paying for it besides you' replaced with 'the kid still doesn't know why he's walking south. I can see that from here. I'd rather not be around when he works it out' — direct accusation, not a quotable aphorism. Also removed narrator commentary at former line 65 ('That landed harder than if he'd raised his voice') which admired Dren's dialogue. Updated the end-of-chapter callback at line 710 to match the new concrete line.

Added two visible moments of self-correction to Vel's confession. (1) At line 279, Vel starts with the technical framing ('The cascade needed someone who could—'), registers that Kem is watching and waiting for the real sentence, and restarts with the uglier truth ('I went looking for somebody to use'). Kem's visible reaction (line 281: 'something behind his face shifted') follows the corrected disclosure. (2) At line 337, Vel begins the drowning-girl story as self-justification ('because a girl was drowning and the Hoarded standing on the bank wouldn't—'), looks at Kem, sees his face has gone still, and names her own dodge ('That's the version that makes me sound like I've always been the person who spends for strangers. Maren was... I went looking for someone to spend. That's different.'). Both friction points show competing impulses disrupting the confession's surface. Kem's watching at the cascade transition (line 279) directly influences Vel's shift from the safe framing to the honest one.

finding_results.notes: Reworked Vel's confession so Maren lands through specific field habits and route-journal texture, the zero event carries tactile and sensory detail, and Vel's body registers the telling in the present scene.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt chapter 16 around active Scour-approach pressure: the eastward covert loop now reconciles the farmhouse distance, the Reserve warning alters action from the opening onward, Vel's confession happens under tactical pressure, and the post-confession route-sharing continues through visible perimeter evidence. Repeated wound/journal/landscape tics were removed while preserving the Dren departure, Maren reveal, and damaged-but-explicit decision to keep walking.

Revised Dren's departure speech to eliminate three theme-mouthpiece lines (balanced antithesis, thematic equivalence, quotable aphorism) and one instance of narrator commentary admiring dialogue, replacing all with concrete trader-register speech grounded in Mira's medical costs, physical caregiving, and direct accusation about Kem's ignorance. Added two moments of visible self-correction to Vel's confession: a false start on the technical/safe framing of the cascade mechanism that Kem's watching forces into honest disclosure, and a mid-sentence catch of the drowning-girl story being deployed as mitigation. Both friction points show competing impulses (truth-telling vs. self-interest) disrupting the confession's surface in ways consistent with Vel's decisive self-correction style.

Localized the confession rewrite to replace abstract Maren/threshold summary with concrete personal detail, a more physically precise collapse-and-threshold memory, and immediate embodied strain on Vel while she tells it.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=9, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
